title: Trackingmovieticketsalestopredictconsumersentiment
thesis: Consumers spend more on discretionary entertainment when they are confident about the economy. Consumer discretionary stocks are sensitive to changes in consumer spending and sentiment.
signal_logic: If 4-week total box office revenue increases >10% vs 3 months ago
entry_exit: Entry: If 4-week total box office revenue increases >10% vs 3 months ago Exit: After 3 weeks or if the 4-week average stops increasing
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Box Office Mojo via scrape (weekly).

schema.idea: Tracking movie ticket sales to predict consumer sentiment
schema.behavior: Consumers spend more on discretionary entertainment when they are confident about the economy.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary stocks are sensitive to changes in consumer spending and sentiment.

trade_logic.entry: If 4-week total box office revenue increases >10% vs 3 months ago
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if the 4-week average stops increasing
